name: Leslie Jue DDS
tagline: A legacy of trust in Sonoma County dentistry
seoDescription: SOCO Dental Studio in Santa Rosa, CA offers cosmetic, restorative, and preventive dentistry. Dr. Leslie Jue has cared for smiles since 1987.

images.heroAlt: Leslie Jue DDS in Santa Rosa, CA

sections.heading: Three generations of dentists, one Santa Rosa practice
sections.subheading: SOCO Dental Studio brings Dr. Leslie Jue's decades of cosmetic and family care together with Drs. Louie and Baird at 55 Mission Circle.
badges: Dr. Leslie Jue caring for smiles since 1987

image.alt: Leslie Jue DDS in Santa Rosa, CA

sections.heading: About SOCO Dental Studio
body: SOCO Dental Studio was formed when Dr. Michael Louie merged two long-established Santa Rosa practices into one home for multi-generational families across Sonoma County. The result is a team built on a legacy of trust, with three generations of dental experience under one roof.

Dr. Leslie Jue has delivered outstanding dental care since 1987. A UC Davis physiology graduate and University of the Pacific, Arthur A. Dugoni School of Dentistry alumna, she is a member of the American Academy of Cosmetic Dentistry and a longtime fixture of the local dental community.
highlights: Dr. Leslie Jue caring for smiles since 1987
University of the Pacific, Dugoni School of Dentistry trained

items.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
items.description: Veneers, bonding, teeth whitening, and full smile makeovers tailored to each patient.

items.title: Invisalign
items.description: Clear, removable aligners that straighten teeth without traditional metal braces.

items.title: Restorative Care
items.description: Crowns, fillings, root canal therapy, and full-mouth rehabilitation to restore function.

items.title: Dental Implants
items.description: Permanent, natural-looking replacements for missing or failing teeth.

items.title: Preventive & Hygiene
items.description: Cleanings, exams, sealants, and periodontal care to keep smiles healthy long term.

items.title: Emergency Dentistry
items.description: Prompt care for dental pain, breaks, and other urgent situations.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Leslie Jue DDS and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

sections.heading: Work with Leslie Jue DDS
sections.body: Find us at 55 Mission Circle. Call (707) 537-1904 — we’re glad to help.
